member.name: M:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.Controllers.v1.CategoryController.SearchCategories(ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.ViewModels.Category.SearchCategoryViewModel)
member.summary: Retrieves categories based on the provided search parameters.
member.remarks:
Notes:
This endpoint does not require authentication.

member.name: M:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.Controllers.v1.CategoryController.GetCategoryById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a category by its ID.
member.remarks:
Notes:
To access this route, it is not necessary to be logged into the system.

member.summary: Creates a new category in the database.
member.remarks:
Notes:
This endpoint does not require authentication.

member.summary: Updates a category in the database.
member.remarks:
Notes:
To access this route, it is not necessary to be logged into the system.

member.name: M:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.Controllers.v1.CategoryController.DeleteCategory(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a category from the database.
member.remarks:
Notes:
To access this route, it is not necessary to be logged into the system.

member.summary: Number of records to be returned per page

member.summary: Property name to sort the retrieved records

member.name: P:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.ViewModels.Category.SearchCategoryViewModel.OrderDirection
member.summary: Sort direction (ASC for ascending; DESC for descending)

member.summary: ID da pessoa

member.summary: Idade mínima (inclusive)

member.summary: Idade máxima (inclusive)

member.name: P:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.ViewModels.People.SearchPeopleViewModel.PageIndex
member.summary: Index da página que deseja obter (iniciando por 1)

member.name: P:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.ViewModels.People.SearchPeopleViewModel.PageSize
member.summary: Quantidade de registros que deverão ser retornados por página

member.summary: Nome da propriedade que se deseja ordenar os registros encontrados

member.name: P:ResidentialExpenseControl.Api.ViewModels.People.SearchPeopleViewModel.OrderDirection
member.summary: Sentido da ordenação (ASC para crescente; DESC para decrescente)
